product_surfaces: cache schema/runtime provenance through internal/cache SQLite store (records and sources tables)
records.provenance CHECK constraint supporting fixture/live values (schema v11 migration)
fixture sync wiring through service.SyncToCache -> cache.UpsertSyncGraph -> records.provenance=fixture
live issue sync wiring through service.BulkSyncIssues -> cache.UpsertSyncGraph -> records.provenance=live
service ListSources exposing both fixture/live provenance in SourceSummary DTOs
service SearchSources exposing provenance in SearchSourceResult DTOs
service GetSource exposing provenance in SourceRecord DTO
service GetSyncStatus exposing provenance in SyncStatusResult DTO
service SyncStatus (batch) exposing non-empty provenance on every SyncStatusResult entry
cache.SourceFilter.SetProvenance executable setter with filtered read exercise
cache.RecordFilter.Provenance field with executable provenance filter
cache.ListRecords filtering by provenance via RecordFilter.Provenance
cache.SearchRecords filtering by provenance via SearchQuery.Provenance
cache.ResetLive executable product path deleting live-origin records from both sources and records
post-reset verification: list/search/get/sync-status show only fixture records, live records cleared
fixture-to-live transition proof: fixture records never report provenance=live across reset
offline repository validation via go test ./... and git diff --check
evidence_type: offline executable Go runtime validation with local httptest external-provider mock and full Go test suite; 24 distinct validation steps exercise schema migration, provenance write to both records and sources, read exposure through service DTOs, RecordFilter provenance filtering, SearchRecords provenance filtering, reset semantics, and fixture-live transition proof
freshness: current source tree at validation execution time; temporary cache/module; live network, real credentials, SSH agent, OS Keychain, and device checks disabled

mocks_used.name: httptest GitCode /api/v5 server
mocks_used.scope: external GitCode HTTP API dependency only; service sync, cache writes, read DTOs, filtered reads, and reset/isolation checks exercise target runtime code

mocks_used.name: temporary SQLite cache and Go validation module
mocks_used.scope: local filesystem isolation for deterministic offline validation
